career_transition.title: Career Transition Planning Session

agenda.title: Introduction & Background
agenda.description: Share your current role and where you want to go

agenda.title: Skills Gap Analysis
agenda.description: Identify what you need to learn for your target role

agenda.title: Action Plan Discussion
agenda.description: Create a concrete timeline with milestones

agenda.title: Resources & Next Steps
agenda.description: Identify learning resources and set first homework

prework: Identify 3 skills you want to develop
followup: Research 2 certifications relevant to your goal

skill_development.title: Skill Development Kickoff

agenda.title: Learning Objectives
agenda.description: Define specific skills to develop over 3 months

agenda.title: Hands-on Focus Area
agenda.description: Pick the first skill to deep dive into

agenda.title: Practice Plan
agenda.description: Set up a regular practice schedule

prework: List AWS services you want to learn
followup: Set up an AWS free tier account

certification_preparation.title: Certification Prep Strategy

agenda.title: Exam Overview
agenda.description: Review the certification exam structure and domains

agenda.title: Resources & Practice Tests
agenda.description: Identify study materials and practice exam sources

prework: Take a practice assessment to baseline your knowledge
followup: Register for the exam (set a target date)

project_guidance.title: Project Architecture Review

agenda.title: Project Overview
agenda.description: Present your project goals and constraints

agenda.title: Best Practices
agenda.description: Discuss AWS best practices for your use case

agenda.title: Action Items
agenda.description: Define specific next steps for the project

followup: Refine the architecture diagram based on discussion
